description: Visit the world's first national park. Marvel at a volcano's inner workings rising up in geysers, see bison, and explore a landscape of thermal wonders.
Not just a great valley, but a shrine to human foresight, the strength of granite, the power of glaciers, the persistence of life, and the tranquility of the High Sierra.
Acadia National Park protects the natural beauty of the highest rocky headlands along the Atlantic coastline of the United States.
